ANTHROPIC_OAUTH_TOKEN.description: Anthropic setup token (run `claude setup-token` in Claude Code to generate one)

PROVIDER.description: LLM provider name (anthropic, openrouter, openai, gemini, groq, mistral, deepseek, ollama, etc.)

ZEROCLAW_ALLOW_PUBLIC_BIND.description: Allow binding to public interfaces (must be true for Railway)

ZEROCLAW_GATEWAY_HOST.description: Gateway bind address (0.0.0.0 for Railway networking)
